description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Submit an RFQ for a CNC-turned stainless steel shaft using stainless steel material, length 120 mm, diameter 20 mm, quantity 250, a tolerance of at most ±0.02 mm, and the fastest standard (non-expedited) lead time of 15 business days or less.

tasks.instruction: Find a 5-axis CNC machining service for aluminum that supports a tolerance of at most ±0.005 in, then choose the option with the tightest available aluminum tolerance and send a contact form message requesting a sample project that uses that service.

tasks.instruction: Use the cost estimator for a medical device component at a quantity of 100 units with a fine surface finish to compare titanium versus stainless steel, then set as preferred the material whose estimated cost per unit is lower and under $40.

tasks.instruction: Locate an aerospace case study with a delivery time of 10 days or less and use its call-to-action to start a new project request that references this case study and targets a similar delivery time.

tasks.instruction: Filter the equipment list to CNC machines that support a maximum part length of at least 500 mm and can achieve a surface finish of Ra 1.6 µm or better, then add the first three matching machines to a comparison view and open the comparison page.
